title: iSOUL Compostable Bagasse Disposable Bowl 350ml, 12oz Eco-Friendly Paper Soup Bowls for Milk Salads, Soups Picnics BBQ Parties Rigid Salad Bowls Sugarcane Paper Bowl White 50 Pack
features: 🍚 Eco-friendly: Made from high-quality natural Sugarcane Bagasse, with no Wax lining, gluten-free and BPA-free so no harm to nature as compostable bowl.
🍜 This Disposable Bowls are very sturdy and can hold Solid food and best for Soup Bowl, Desserts & Salad Bowl, Deep Round, Sturdy Paper Bowls for Hot Food Parties.

🥣 Compostable: These Bagasse bowls are made from 100% sugarcane, these plates can be commercially composted, The salad bowls perfect for cereal or soup at a family BBQ picnic or lunch. Perfect for cold foods like ice cream and snacks also perfect for hot food like soups and chili

🍲 Size: This Multi-Pack White Bowls capacity is 12oz and approx 350ml liquid Capacity with hold of Rigid Sugarcane Fiber natural strength to be more durable to use in use it in the Microwave and fridge as well

🍨 Safe for Microwave & Freeze: These Paper bowls complement with Daily and party Use Best for Restaurants, Party, and BBQs The 12oz 350ml are safe to use in Microwave for Hot Food Like soup, Fryes, and Freezer for Cold Food Like Deserts, Fruits, milk, Cereals, Nutspopcorn, snacks, small salads, Chili Soups, Dips, side dishes.
